title: Medieval Weapons & Tools
description: Replaces Weapons & Tools with custom 32x32 textures
body:
# Medieval Weapons & Tools

This Pack should be compatible with most Minecraft versions, but you'll obviously only have spears in 1.21.11+/copper tools in 1.21.9+/netherite tools in 1.16+/crossbows in 1.14+/.
This Pack fits really well with my 'Helmets to Crowns' pack (You can find it in my profile).
This Pack could be incompatible with some other packs like the 'Item Stitching Fix' in 'VanillaTweaks'.

With version v1.2.0 there also comes a smaller mace pack as a supplementary pack when you look up the version details.

## Usecases

This pack can be used in pretty much every situation, no matter if it's Roleplay or just normal Gameplay.

![Player with Spyglass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b6c8357a14d31a12530605a947094161d308abc.jpeg)

With this project I tried to create a pack that not only looks good but also keeps Vanilla Style and doesn't annoy when gaming.

![Player with Trident](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/113377aba2b223768f069b95a53c55fda34482ee.jpeg)
